hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys,datetime; data=json.load(sys.stdin); entry={'event':'PreToolUse','tool':data.get('tool_name',''),'input_preview':str(data.get('tool_input',''))[:200],'ts':datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat()}; f=open('oracle/logs/claude_hooks.jsonl','a'); f.write(json.dumps(entry)+'\n'); f.close()" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "import json,sys,datetime; data=json.load(sys.stdin); entry={'event':'PostToolUse','tool':data.get('tool_name',''),'exit_code':data.get('exit_code',0),'output_preview':str(data.get('tool_response',''))[:200],'ts':datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat()}; f=open('oracle/logs/claude_hooks.jsonl','a'); f.write(json.dumps(entry)+'\n'); f.close()" 2>/dev/null || true
